name: MozLocal Product Overview
heading: __MISSING__
product_overview_description:
MozLocal is a tool for managing local SEO and online presence. It automates the distribution of business information across major directories, search engines, and maps, ensuring accuracy and consistency. With real-time updates, you can quickly reflect changes in business details. MozLocal also offers review management, allowing you to monitor and respond to customer reviews from one dashboard. Its reporting and analytics provide insights into local search performance and competitor analysis. Data cleansing features suppress duplicate listings and ensure data accuracy. Integration with Moz Pro combines local listings with on-site optimization. MozLocal saves time, improves customer engagement, and enhances online visibility.

Features 

  • Helps manage and sync your business listings across Google, Facebook, and multiple other sites 
  • Keep your listings updated across search engines, directories, social media, apps, and data aggregators from a single dashboard
  • Automatically eliminates duplicate listings 
  • Helps you understand the photos, data, and information one needs to optimize their profile and ensures that the listings are listed automatically to various directories and search engines. 
  • Monitor, read, and respond to reviews on multiple sites from a single dashboard
  • Monitor review sentiment, common keywords in reviews, and customer feedback over time.
  • Improve response times with instant alerts of new customer reviews about your business on the major sites.
  • Keep your local listings information updated on Google and Facebook
  • Lets you upload rich content and improve conversion rates by adding photos, special offers, store hours, a compelling business description, and more.
  •  Share news, photos, special offers, and Q&As to multiple directories.
  • Understand how to improve your profiles and identify which listings need attention.
  • Track your online review performance and measure your customer sentiment scores online
  • Measure and track how users found you online with features such as driving directions, phone searches, operational hours, and more. 

Pros

✅Easy to generate reports and insights for your customers 

✅Reasonably priced 

Cons

❌Customers say that the tool offers fewer features as compared to its competitors

❌Customer support is slow and often takes very long to resolve your queries 

❌Does not support bulk verification for listing management 

❌The invoice structures are not very clear and easy to understand 

Pricing 

Follows three different pricing modules across the US, UK, and Canada. However, it is pretty reasonably priced. Also, reputation management is only available for premium plans, which makes it difficult for people with a base variant to access basic reputation management capabilities. 

Source: MozLocal
